_note: DISPLAY-SIDE MIRROR. Source of truth is gravel-god-training-plans/db/testimonials.json — this file is synced FROM that one, one-way. Only entries that are verified + have explicit display consent get copied here; this is what generate_training_plan_pages.py reads to render the on-site reviews section. Never author new entries directly in this file. Governed by the scoring-and-veracity skill: an entry renders on a plan page ONLY if verified_by is set AND consent is true AND display is true.

_fields.plan_ref: human plan title or planId the review is about
_fields.tier: Finisher | Compete | Masters 50+ | Time-Crunched | Save My Race
_fields.headline: benefit-led one line (best-seller testimonial format)
_fields.body: the quote in the athlete's words
_fields.outcome: specific verifiable result if any (PB, first finish, AG place)
_fields.source_ref: the actual evidence pointer (TP review URL / Gmail msgId / survey id) — REQUIRED, this is the anti-fabrication anchor
_fields.consent: boolean — explicit consent to display publicly
